---
title: "Shiny"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Interactive Shiny App

This page presents my interactive dashboard built using Shiny.

## Project Overview
Unlike the static dashboard, this app allows users to explore the data dynamically by selecting different filters and metrics.

## Features
- Filter by date range  
- Select different performance metrics  
- Compare content types  
- Explore trends over time  

## View the App
[Launch Shiny App](https://eunicew.shinyapps.io/msdm-project-eunice/

## Why It Matters
This interactive approach allows users to analyze performance from multiple perspectives instead of relying on a single summary.
